title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. velenovskiana
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. velenovskiana, also known as the Velvet Pincushion or Small Scabious, is a subspecies of the Scabiosa genus, a type of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria subsp. velenovskiana include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of minor wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
